papers.title: Efficient and Explainable End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Masked Modeling
papers.summary: 提出基于掩码建模的高效可解释端到端自动驾驶框架

papers.title: ResWorld: Temporal Residual World Model for E2E Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: 时序残差世界模型，减少静态区域建模提升规划精度

papers.title: Latent-WAM: Latent World Action Modeling for E2E Driving
papers.summary: 基于潜在空间的世界-动作建模实现高效规划

papers.title: Reconstruction Matters: Geometry-Aligned BEV for Perception
papers.summary: 学习几何对齐的BEV表示超越端到端训练范式

papers.title: CausalVAD: De-confounding E2E Driving via Causal Training
papers.summary: 因果训练消除混淆变量提升驾驶模型可靠性

papers.title: AlignDrive: Aligned Lateral-Longitudinal Planning for E2E Driving
papers.summary: 对齐横纵规划解决并行规划协调失败

papers.title: Multi-kilometer Simulation with Long-horizon Occupancy World Models
papers.summary: OccSim：首个占用世界模型驱动的3D模拟器，无需连续日志或高精地图，可稳定生成3000+连续帧，支持4公里以上大规模3D占用地图构建

papers.title: The Era of End-to-End Autonomy: Transitioning from Rule-Based Driving to Large Driving Models
papers.authors: Julie Stephany Berrio Perez et al.
papers.summary: 分析从模块化规则驱动到端到端学习系统的转变，涵盖特斯拉FSD V12/V14、Rivian统一智能平台、NVIDIA Cosmos等商业部署
